channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Trump clarifies AI-generated Jesus image was intended to depict him as a doctor
item.description: A Reuters-reported article published on April 14, 2026, covers former US President Donald Trump’s clarification regarding an AI-generated image that depicted Jesus in a medical context. According to t...

item.title: Maasai Mara lion Kiminati dies after injured in confrontation with a hippo during hunt
item.description: The Kenya Wildlife Service (KWS) has confirmed the death of Kiminati, an 11-year-old male lion from the Maasai Mara ecosystem, following a violent encounter with a hippo. According to reports from KWS...

item.title: Community rallies to support long-serving Vredekloof firefighter Mark Randall battling prostate cancer
item.description: In a heartwarming display of community solidarity, residents of Vredekloof and surrounds have come together to back 63-year-old Mark Randall, a dedicated Volunteer Wildfire Services firefighter and fa...

item.title: Practical advice for beginners on starting a vegetable garden anywhere
item.description: The article from The Guardian offers practical guidance for anyone who wants to start growing their own vegetables, even with limited space. Experts emphasise that outdoor access is not essential; veg...

item.title: Ned Nwoko Seeks Additional $396 Million Paris Club Payment Under Tinubu Despite 2018 Final Settlement
item.description: Wetin dey happen for this Paris Club refund matter na serious issue wey dey cause plenty noise for Naija politics. Senator Ned Nwoko wey represent Delta North, through him company Linas International,...

item.title: Susan Nakhumicha Endorses Moses Wetang'ula as President Ruto's Successor in 2032
item.description: Former Health Cabinet Secretary Susan Nakhumicha has openly stated that National Assembly Speaker Moses Wetang'ula will succeed President William Ruto in 2032 after Ruto completes his expected second ...

item.title: Cold front expected to bring thunderstorms and mountain snow across Utah with strong winds and shifting conditions
item.description: A developing weather system is expected to impact Utah beginning Sunday, bringing a combination of strong winds, thunderstorms, and mountain snowfall. According to the forecast, wind advisories have b...

item.title: Congress plans women’s reservation within current Lok Sabha seats amid debate on delimitation
item.description: The Congress party has outlined its strategy to push for 33% reservation for women within the existing 543 Lok Sabha seats, rather than linking it to any expansion of parliamentary seats. The party is...

item.title: Strait of Hormuz tensions: Legal debate over proposed blockade and maritime law
item.description: The article discusses rising geopolitical tensions around the Strait of Hormuz after reports that the United States, under President Donald Trump, announced plans for a naval ‘blockade’ of the strateg...

item.title: Lahore High Court restores 2022 policy on foreign funding for local NGOs and NPOs
item.description: The Lahore High Court on Monday restored the federal government's Policy for Local NGOs/NPOs Receiving Foreign Contributions 2022 by setting aside a single bench ruling from September 2024 that had de...

item.title: WTO opens 2026 Young Professionals Programme for eligible Kenyan applicants in Geneva
item.description: The World Trade Organization (WTO) has opened its 2026 Young Professionals Programme (YPP), giving an opportunity for young professionals from member countries, including Kenya, to gain practical expe...

item.title: Lassa fever outbreak rises in Nigeria, health authorities advise preventive measures
item.description: Lassa fever don come back again dey spread across different states for Nigeria, with reports showing over 109 deaths recorded up to the beginning of 2026. The viral disease, popularly known as “rat fe...

item.title: Global Energy Bodies Warn Nations Against Hoarding Supplies and Export Restrictions Amid Severe Crisis
item.description: The International Monetary Fund, World Bank, and International Energy Agency have jointly appealed to all countries to refrain from hoarding energy supplies and introducing export controls. This call ...

item.title: 27 students injured after lecture hall slab collapses at Kabianga University during exams
item.description: At least 27 students from Kabianga University in Kericho County sustained injuries after the upper slab of a lecture hall came off during an examination session on Monday, 13th April 2026. The inciden...

item.title: Steve Nyerere Urges Tanzanian Youth to Focus on Development Instead of Unproductive Politics
item.description: Famous Tanzanian comedian and Chairman of Mama Ongea na Mwanao initiative, Steve Nyerere, has strongly advised all Tanzanians especially the young people to stop spending too much time in unproductive...

item.title: Customs officers detained over suspected tampering of seized silver during transport
item.description: The Pakistan Customs has arrested two preventive officers accused of replacing nearly 400 kilograms of seized silver bullion with lead during official transportation from Quetta to Lahore. According t...

item.title: RCMP undercover operation used elaborate fake criminal world in Dean Penney murder investigation
item.description: An RCMP undercover operation spanning four years in Newfoundland and Labrador is at the centre of the first-degree murder trial of Dean Penney, who is accused in the 2016 disappearance of his estrange...

item.title: Turkey–Israel tensions rise as FM Fidan warns of new regional rivalry narrative
item.description: Turkish Foreign Minister Hakan Fidan has alleged that Israel is attempting to portray Turkiye as its “new enemy”, amid rising diplomatic tensions between Ankara and Tel Aviv. Speaking in a televised i...

item.title: Dr. Augustus Kyalo Muli and NLP Build Grassroots Support in Ukambani Through Town Hall Meetings
item.description: In Ukambani region, a new political movement is growing quietly but steadily. Dr. Augustus Kyalo Muli, the leader of the National Liberal Party (NLP), is focusing on village-level engagement instead o...

item.title: Kwara Political Aide Facing DSS Summons After Criticising VP Shettima and Governor Over Kaiama Attacks
item.description: One political aide for Kaiama Local Government Area for Kwara State, Zakari Hassan, wey be Special Assistant on Youths to the local government chairman, don enter fresh trouble after im post one viral...
